context: Realistic: cached user profile includes role used for permission checks, not invalidated on revocation

checklist.name: Catches stale role in cache
checklist.description: Identifies that the prefetch cache stores user profile data including the role/permissions field, and that permission checks in the UI read from this cache — if a user's role is revoked by another admin, the cached data still shows the old role until TTL expires or manual refresh

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds a caching layer that affects permission-sensitive UI rendering
